message:
wa-985.5: comprehensive analytics test suite (17 new tests)

Add integration and edge-case tests covering the full analytics pipeline:

Data model & queries:
- Batch record → aggregate daily/by-agent flow
- Empty batch noop, all 6 MetricType variants, NULL agent/tokens handling
- Query ordering (DESC), purge-all, serde roundtrips for MetricRecord,
  DailyMetricSummary, AgentMetricBreakdown, MetricQuery defaults

Integration (record → aggregate → render):
- Summary: record batch → compute totals → render JSON/plain
- Daily: record → aggregate_daily → render JSON
- By-agent: record → aggregate_by_agent → render with percentages
- Export: record → query → CSV/JSON export

Alert integration:
- Record cost + token metrics → check_alerts → verify levels and summaries
- Purge old metrics → verify alerts unaffected (window-based)

Total analytics tests: 72 (32 usage_metrics + 15 CLI + 14 alerts unit + 11 alert monitor)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
